prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2024年最低位次约12614名，2025年约13650名，一年间后移约1036名，呈明显后移趋势；2025年基准位次约13650名；该校在北京市2024年、20 25年招生计划均为6人，2026年计划仍为6人，连续三年持平，无扩招缓解竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜2026年约第79名，近年排 名稳定在75-80区间，属于中上水平211；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第70，评价为一般，短视频曝光量处于 中等水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；心理学获评A+（全国顶尖），马克思主义理论获评A，教育学、体育学获评A-；心理学为该校王牌学科，对相关专业 报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育大类2024年专业热度为分化观望，整体平稳；北京市2026年高考报名总人数约84900人，较2025年65434人增长约29.7%，考 生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧；华南师范大学位于广东省广州市，属于跨省招生；在北京招生计划仅6人，属于小众选择，考 生规模大幅增长对位次的影响可能被稀释，但整体竞争压力仍呈上升态势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、北京市考生总数大幅增长约30%等因 素，在2025年基准13650名基础上预计竞争略有加剧；预测最低位次约13850名，区间13350-14350名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间内（13350-14350名）建议以二档经济学为主、一档应用心理学冲刺、三档传播学保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<13350名）可重点冲一档应用心理学王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>14350名）建议以三档传播学为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The lowest ranking in 2024 was approximately 12614, and in 2025 approximately 13650, shifting backward by about 1036 positions in one year, showing a clear backward trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 13650; the university's enrollment plan in Beijing for 2024 and 2025 was 6 students each, and the 2026 plan remains 6 students, unchanged for three consecutive years, with no expansion to ease competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 79th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with recent rankings stable in the 75-80 range, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 70th, rated as average, with short video exposure at a medium level, showing no clear signs of increased application attention; Psychology is rated A+ (top in the country), Marxist Theory is rated A, Education and Physical Education are rated A-; Psychology is the university's flagship discipline, which has a certain appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of the Normal/Education category in 2024 is differentiated and wait-and-see, overall stable; the total number of college entrance examination registrants in Beijing for 2026 is about 84900, an increase of about 29.7% from 65434 in 2025, with a significant increase in the number of candidates, leading to intensified competition; South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, and is a cross-provincial enrollment; the enrollment plan in Beijing is only 6 students, which is a niche choice; the impact of the large increase in the number of candidates on rankings may be diluted, but the overall competitive pressure is still on the rise.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and the significant increase of about 30% in the total number of candidates in Beijing, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 13650; the predicted lowest ranking is about 13850, with a range of 13350-14350.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (13350-14350), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Economics as the main choice, with Tier 1 Applied Psychology as a reach and Tier 3 Communication Studies as a safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<13350), focus on reaching for the flagship Tier 1 Applied Psychology major; for rankings near the upper limit (>14350), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 Communication Studies.
